current_facts: 当前不是 true 3D world model。
当前不是 large-scale foundation world model。
当前仍是 protected dataset-local / raw-frame 2.5D 多智能体 world-state candidate。
Stage42-HO 是长期目标覆盖审计：不下载、不转换、不训练、不调 test threshold。
本阶段把 Stage42 Long Research Mode A-F 要求映射到当前 authoritative evidence。
future endpoint / future waypoint 只可作为 supervised/evaluation labels，不可作为 inference input。
不使用 central velocity，不使用 test endpoints 建 goals，不使用 test metrics 调 threshold。
t+50 / t+100 仍是 raw-frame horizon，不能写成 seconds-level。
dataset-local/raw-frame 不能写成 global metric。

context.reason: Fresh sequence and graph residual context variants underperformed the baseline-family rollout control on all/t50/hard.

stage_b_external_validation.next_action: expand independent legal source diversity; do not broaden metric/time claim.

stage_c_full_waypoint_dynamics.next_action: continue source-level group-consistency/full-waypoint training rather than endpoint-only bridge overclaims.

stage_d_causal_ablation.evidence: history/safe-switch/floor/group-consistency supported; JEPA/scene/goal/neighbor independent main claims blocked under current protocols.

blocked_by: Fresh sequence and graph residual context variants underperformed the baseline-family rollout control on all/t50/hard.
JEPA non-collapse without stable downstream lift.

stage_e_safety_floor.evidence: Protected candidates pass; ungated neural remains unsafe; floor-free/global removal is blocked.
stage_e_safety_floor.next_action: study slice-specific floor relaxation only under validation-selected proximity/conformal guards.

stage_f_paper_package.evidence: paper package, model/data cards, claim guards, and gap analysis exist; metric/time/source-diversity still blocked.
stage_f_paper_package.next_action: keep paper framing as protected raw-frame 2.5D world-state dynamics; add legal external source or restricted metric/time subset before stronger claims.

overall_stage42_long_goal.evidence: Strong protected 2.5D evidence exists, but full objective still requires metric/time or broader external/source evidence and stronger independent module proof.
overall_stage42_long_goal.next_action: continue long research mode; do not mark goal complete.
